Makefile for building Sphinx documentation with customizable options and targets.

# Purpose
This Makefile is used to automate the process of building Sphinx documentation. It defines several variables, such as `SPHINXOPTS`, `SPHINXBUILD`, `SOURCEDIR`, and `BUILDDIR`, which control the behavior of the Sphinx build process. The `help` target is included to provide users with guidance on available make targets by executing the Sphinx build command with the `help` option. The `.PHONY` directive specifies that `help` and `Makefile` are not actual files, ensuring that the `help` target is always executed when called. Additionally, a catch-all target is defined to route any unknown make targets to Sphinx using the "make mode" option, allowing for flexible and dynamic documentation building.
